p3.title: minimum_closeout_status silently removed from current_subphase
p3.finding: The contract current_subphase lost minimum_closeout_status while moving to CP00-079.
p3.recommendation: Fixed by restoring minimum_closeout_status: production_ready in contracts/control-plane-contract.json.

p3.title: Embedded contract definition input/result should be directly asserted
p3.finding: The contract mirror test did not initially run the embedded definition result through the CP00-079 result validator or compare it directly with the fixture result.
p3.recommendation: Fixed by adding direct result validator and fixture deepEqual assertions to the CP00-079 contract mirror test.

notes: Single valid CP00-079 Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
